scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/shared && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/api-client && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/vehicle-catalog && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/legal && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/ui && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/garage-obd && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/admin-core
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/api-client && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/vehicle-catalog && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/legal && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/ui && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/garage-obd && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/admin-core
scripts.build:admin-apps: npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/admin-desktop && npm run build --workspace @carloi-v3/admin-mobile
scripts.typecheck:admin-apps: npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/admin-desktop && npm run typecheck --workspace @carloi-v3/admin-mobile
